evidence_direction_note: 2026-05-03 governance walk: reclassified inconclusive. C1 PASS replicates the known unsupervised-degeneracy baseline (cosine ~ 1.0). C2/C3/C4 FAIL but the soft-contrastive arm produced catastrophic harm_r2 collapse (-7163, -1810, -3000 across seeds) consistent with contrastive loss disrupting z_world updates rather than failing to differentiate context. Per existing EQN, supervised-training-prerequisite is upstream blocker; this run does not adjudicate the strong reading. Routes to a successor that decouples contrastive loss from z_world joint training.
